title: SCN2A mutations cause autism spectrum disorder
abstract: Whole genome sequencing of 100 autism families revealed de novo variants in SCN2A. We performed CRISPR-based perturbation studies in human brain organoids. Single-cell RNA-seq revealed disrupted excitatory neuron differentiation. Our organoid models show altered seizure susceptibility phenotypes. Data is available in dbGaP (phs001234.v1.p1) with open access supplementary data.
